title: Claude 帮我来逆向 真的很有意思 有人也研究这个么
content: A developer used Claude Opus to reverse-engineer the Futu/Moomoo macOS client's private protocol, creating "futu-moni"—a zero-dependency Python command-line tool that retrieves real-time stock quotes for Hong Kong, US, and Japanese markets without requiring OpenD, API keys, or the official SDK. The tool works by replaying login packets, parsing the proprietary FT protocol over TCP 443, querying the client's local SQLite database for internal security IDs, and automatically routing requests by market.

title: 突发叫停，Gemini 3.5 Pro难产，谷歌跌入失望陷阱
content: Google has indefinitely delayed its Gemini 3.5 Pro AI model ("Cappuccino"), reportedly by months, due to failing internal benchmarks—particularly in coding capabilities. Emergency training data updates produced "disappointing" results. The delay exposes deep structural problems at Google: bureaucratic inefficiency slows decision-making; engineer distrust of AI-generated code limited training data; and capital expenditure of $35.7 billion in Q1 still left internal teams facing GPU shortages. Talent is fleeing to rivals. Analysts frame this as part of an industry-wide "next-generation giant model disappointment trap," where scaling laws show diminishing returns, high-quality training data is exhausted, and Transformer architecture approaches limits.

title: What loss.backward() actually does
content: Loss.backward() computes gradients of a neural network's loss with respect to its parameters using backpropagation. It traverses the computation graph from the loss node to all leaf nodes (like weights and biases), applying the chain rule to calculate derivatives. These gradients indicate how much each parameter contributes to the loss and are stored in each tensor's .grad attribute. The method does not update weights itself; that requires an optimizer step.

title: 为爱发电， kkRepo 开源来真的，自掏腰包买域名+腾讯云服务器，官网演示站正式发布 https://kkrepo.cn
content: kkRepo is a community-driven, open-source self-hosted artifact repository designed as an alternative to Sonatype Nexus Community Edition. It supports multiple artifact formats including Maven, npm, PyPI, Go, Helm, Docker, and others. The project's official demo site is now live at kkrepo.cn, hosted on an overseas Tencent Cloud server. kkRepo has already replaced Nexus at one listed photovoltaic company, with a Hong Kong-listed company preparing to adopt it. The project was formerly named nexus-plus but was renamed after receiving a legal notice from Nexus.

title: vibe coding 把我们按键热力图也改变了
content: The author analyzed keyboard letter frequency shifts caused by vibe coding. When coding in English, "e" dominates, with "t,a,s,r,i" as secondary high-frequency letters. However, Chinese pinyin input drastically changes patterns: "i" becomes the most-used letter, followed by "n,a,e,u,h,g,o,d,c"—a distribution reflecting Mandarin phonology rather than English letter frequencies.

title: 韩国股市“疯牛”之后“熊出没”，2.3万亿韩元被强平，总统紧急下场干预
content: South Korea's KOSPI index surged 116% by June 2026, then plunged 25%, triggering 2.3 trillion won in forced liquidations between May and mid-July. Retail investors, heavily using margin trading and leveraged ETFs on stocks like Samsung and SK Hynix, suffered massive losses. The market saw 36 trading halts and 7 circuit breakers. President Lee Jae-myung intervened, prompting regulators to ban new single-stock leveraged ETFs, raise margin requirements, and limit purchases. Analysts say deleveraging remains incomplete, with structural risks persisting until margin debt and forced liquidations stabilize.

title: 对存储当下、未来风险与机遇的思考
content: Storage and interconnect stocks plunged amid market panic, but their decline logic differs. Storage's drop reflects valuation correction after crowded trades, not fundamentals, as HBM technology creates genuine moats through deep customization with GPUs. Interconnect's fall stems purely from risk-aversion-driven deleveraging, with no operational deterioration. The real near-term risk is potential broad-market selloff should optimistic macro expectations fail. Earnings season shows extreme intolerance for merely meeting expectations. Short-term demand pushback on pricing exists, yet long-term AI's shift from compute to memory bottlenecks supports massive value revaluation, with over 60% HBM revenue locked in long-term contracts enabling stable margins warranting growth-stock multiples rather than traditional cyclical valuation.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 别再写提示词，Claude官方亲自教你用4种循环自动干活
content: Claude Code has defined four AI agent loop types with distinct stop conditions. Turn-based loops let humans control each round manually. Goal loops use an evaluator model to check against fixed standards before stopping. Time loops trigger at set intervals like cron jobs. Proactive loops run unattended, triggered by events or schedules, suitable for continuous tasks like bug triage. The article emphasizes that effective loop design requires clear verification methods, cost controls, and gating conditions—machine-checkable done states, hard caps on rounds/spending, and stagnation detection—to prevent runaway costs and endless unproductive cycles.

title: 复盘2015：那个盛夏
content: In July 2015, the narrator vacationed with parents at a rural Beijing cottage when China's A-share market crashed. Despite holding full positions in Liyade stock through multiple consecutive limit-down days with zero leverage, the parents maintained complete trust without complaint. Meanwhile, a leveraged friend went bankrupt overnight, sitting on his doorstep in despair. The narrator's sister nearly sold at the panic bottom but was persuaded to hold. The year ended with 142% returns, and Liyade rose to new highs in 2016–2017. Core lessons: leverage kills in bear markets; survival comes from valuing fundamentals, preserving capital, and honoring trust rather than timing markets.

title: SQL 查不到数据，数据却明明存在——MySQL 降序主键与 index_merge intersect 的一次诡异排查
content: A MySQL query anomaly where records existed but returned empty when adding an equality condition. Investigation revealed the root cause: MySQL 8.0.26's index_merge intersect algorithm is incompatible with descending composite primary keys. The table had an unusual primary key `(id DESC, status)`. When queries used `biz_id = ? AND status = ?`, the optimizer chose index_merge intersect on two indexes. The intersection algorithm mishandled rowid byte ordering due to the descending primary key, incorrectly filtering out matching rows. Solutions included query hints to force index usage or disable index_merge, with the final fix being changing the primary key to standard `(id)`.

title: papi酱用AI制造了2026第一神曲
content: Papi Jiang's AI-generated song "Sheng Qi Le" became 2026's first viral hit, spreading across Chinese social media through memes, video remixes, and brand marketing. The track, with AI-composed music and human-written lyrics blending melancholic闽南 melody with absurd modern complaints, exemplifies how AI lowers music creation barriers. Similar phenomena emerged globally, like Bill Stiteler's AI Puerto Rico song. These cases show music evolving from finished artworks into easily adaptable, rapidly produced content tools for personal expression, social interaction, and commercial use—driven by "borrowed nostalgia" and meme-friendly simplicity rather than musical innovation itself.

title: 前 OpenAI CTO 发布首款 AI 大模型 Inkling：架构借鉴 DeepSeek-V3，使用 Kimi K2.5 改进
content: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati's startup Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, its first open-weight AI model. The architecture draws from DeepSeek-V3, with post-training refinement using Kimi K2.5 data. The model supports on-premises deployment and fine-tuning, though its overall performance trails leading competitors. The company also launched the Tinker enterprise fine-tuning platform and previewed an audio-visual interactive model in May. Founded about a year ago, the company raised $2 billion in seed funding at a $12 billion valuation from investors including Andreessen Horowitz, Nvidia, AMD, and Jane Street. Chinese AI models now collectively surpass U.S. usage.

title: 一个侗寨女人的返乡实验｜故事FM | 原文
content: Wu Fengying, a Dong ethnic woman from Meide Village in Guizhou province, returned to her traditional wooden village after struggling with long-term separation from her children while working away. Her story illustrates the tension between rural tradition and urban migration, and her choice to prioritize family over economic migration.

title: 传小红书商业化核心高管纳什离职
content: Xiaohongshu commercialization executive Nash, general manager of the commercial education and comprehensive services division, has reportedly resigned. He oversaw education, local life, and commercial monetization—key revenue areas for the platform. Since a February organizational restructuring, he had focused on commercial operations and represented the company at industry events. The company has not responded to media inquiries. The departure follows other recent executive exits from Xiaohongshu's commercialization team.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 钛媒体

title: DeepSeek 开始筹备上市，年度经常性收入达 4 亿至 5 亿美元
content: DeepSeek is preparing for a second funding round of $7.4 billion at a $74 billion valuation, targeting a STAR Market IPO filing this year and listing next year. Through QFLP structures, it accepts U.S. dollar investments, including from Middle Eastern investors via direct shareholding or SPVs. The AI company reports annual recurring revenue of $400–500 million with over 50% gross margin and a price-to-sales ratio around 148x. Its May Series A raised approximately $7.4 billion at a $57 billion valuation from investors including Tencent and JD.com, with founder Liang Wenfeng as the largest single contributor.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 雷锋网

title: 开润股份披露 DeepSeek 最新估值，本轮融资后估值达 3510 亿元
content: Kairun Co. disclosed that Chinese AI firm DeepSeek is valued at approximately 351 billion yuan (~$49 billion) post-funding. Sources confirmed DeepSeek has launched a second funding round, while plans for a STAR Market IPO by year-end remain uncertain. The disclosure came via Kairun's investment progress announcement.

title: 邮件误发导致苹果与 OpenAI 谈判破裂，随后对簿公堂
content: Apple sued OpenAI in July 2026, alleging systematic poaching of hardware talent and trade secret theft. The dispute escalated after Apple's external lawyer Gabriel Gross mistakenly sent an email intended for a former employee to OpenAI's general counsel Che Chang in February 2026, fabricating a nonexistent phone call. Though Gross apologized the next day, communication broke down completely, foreclosing any chance of out-of-court settlement.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 新浪科技

title: OpenAI 介绍内部漏洞检测模型 GPT-Red
content: OpenAI introduced GPT-Red, an internal "red team" model that automates simulated cyberattacks to improve product robustness. Trained via self-play reinforcement learning alongside defensive LLMs, it evolves stronger attacks as defenses improve. Since GPT-5.3, every production model has been trained with GPT-Red, reducing chain-of-thought attack success rates dramatically—GPT-5.6 Sol shows only 0.05% failure on direct prompt injection. The model is isolated from production systems.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - IT 之家

title: ai 时代程序员这个职业更适合 wfh 了
content: The author argues that AI coding makes remote work more suitable for programmers. As AI handles code implementation, programmers focus on requirements documentation, where written communication proves more efficient. Video meetings surpass verbal discussions for accountability and record-keeping. Working from home improves comfort and makes overtime more acceptable, boosting productivity. The author views WFH as an inevitable trend and seeks such positions for future employment.

title: 首尔 ICML 四天：模型吃掉一切的速度，快过所有人找身位的速度丨五源孟醒 | 原文
content: At this year's ICML conference in Seoul, Chinese AI teams attended in force due to easier visa access. The author observed widespread anxiety as AI models rapidly consolidate capabilities, forcing researchers and companies to constantly reposition. The "model eats everything" trend outpaces strategic planning, leaving participants uncertain about sustainable differentiation in an increasingly expensive and crowded field.

title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
content: OpenAI is implementing safety measures for teen ChatGPT users, including age-appropriate protections, educational tools, parental controls, and collaborations with experts to ensure responsible AI access for younger audiences.
